response.justification: Maria Rodriguez has 15+ years of broad software engineering experience and genuine entrepreneurial instincts as founder of GISCollective, satisfying the minimum tenure threshold. However, the Principal Engineer (AI Strategy) role requires a Director-level IC with deep, recognized AI/ML expertise, demonstrated AI-powered products at scale, and a track record of advising strategic customers on AI adoption — none of which her resume establishes. Her only AI-adjacent work began in April 2025 (MCP tooling at re:cinq), she holds no advanced degree in an AI-related field, and her career arc is that of a strong hands-on generalist rather than a technical strategist positioned to influence enterprise AI direction.
strengths: 15+ years of continuous software engineering across diverse domains (web, mobile, embedded, high-throughput data infrastructure) meets the minimum experience floor
Founder of GISCollective with sustained open-source platform ownership demonstrates entrepreneurial initiative aligned with the preferred intrapreneur profile
Recent hands-on work with MCP code generators and agentic workflow frameworks at re:cinq shows current, first-hand engagement with the AI tooling ecosystem
concerns: AI expertise is shallow and very recent — limited to developer tooling started in April 2025, far below the 'recognized expertise with demonstrated AI products or platforms' expected at this level
No evidence of strategic advisory work, enterprise customer engagement, or thought leadership at the scale the key responsibilities demand
No graduate-level AI or ML education; holds two Bachelor's degrees (CS and Fine Arts/Design) where a Master's or PhD in an AI-related field is preferred

key_factors.factor: Absent AI depth and strategic advisory track record
No Director-level IC or customer-facing technical strategy experience
15+ years broad engineering experience with entrepreneurial history
